title: lissochilus lonchophyllus
intro: Lissochilus lonchophyllus, also known as the Hook-leaved Lissochilus or Hook-leaved Water Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lissochilus lonchophyllus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Lissochilus lonchophyllus typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or topical treatments.
